messages.content: My Myslice got locked. What do I do now?

outputs.final_response:
If your MySlice account is locked, you should take the following steps:

1. **Contact Support**: Call the IT Help Desk at 315.443.2677 to unlock your account and change your password. This is necessary if your account was locked for security reasons.

2. **Secure Your Account**: Once you regain access, follow the recommended steps to ensure your account is secure. This may include checking for any unauthorized authentication methods linked to your account.

For more detailed information, you can refer to the [Securing SUMail After A Security Lock](https://answers.atlassian.syr.edu/wiki/spaces/ITHELP/pages/159941492/Securing+SUMail+After+A+Security+Lock) page.
